headline: JPMorgan Scales Blockchain Platform via Mitsubishi Tie-Up
summary: JPMorgan taps blockchain deal with Mitsubishi as Kinexys scales toward $10B daily payments, signaling deeper integration of tech in global finance.

headline: Franklin Templeton Strengthens Global Client Group Leadership with Key Appointments
summary: SAN MATEO, Calif., March 31, 2026--Franklin Templeton, a global investment leader, today announced the appointment of Brett Mossman as Head of U.S. Product and Lyenda Delp as Head of Global Insurance and Institutional Asset Solutions, alongside the elevation of Kim Roy to Chief Operating Officer (COO) of the Global Client Group (GCG). These appointments reflect the firm’s strategy of aligning its Global Client Group around a simpler, more connected model designed to accelerate growth and deepen

headline: Assessing Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation After FTSE All-World Index Removal
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) was recently removed from the FTSE All-World Index, an event that can influence trading as index-tracking funds rebalance. This may affect liquidity, ownership mix and how some investors view the stock. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. At a share price of US$22.91, Franklin Resources has seen a 13.68% 1 month share price decline and softer recent momentum, despite a 25.82% 1 year total shareholder return that points to a mixed longer term picture. If...
